content:
Aman Kumar
Full-Stack Engineer·Backend Systems·GenAI·Blockchain
Dhanbad, Jharkhand·+91-7462015068·ranjannikhi334@gmail.com·GitHub·LinkedIn·Portfolio
Summary
Full-stack engineer with production experience shipping healthcare APIs, real-time communication systems, and GenAI-augmented
platforms.  Skilled in Node.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure.  Nationally recognized Reliance Foundation Scholar; runner-up and
finalist at multiple healthcare and startup hackathons.
Education
Birsa Institute of Technology, SindriSept 2024 – May 2028
B.Tech in Computer Science and EngineeringCGPA: 8.0/10.0
Experience
Software Engineering Intern·CliniceaMar 2026 – Present
•Engineered ABDM (HPR/HFR) and eTIMS API integrations enabling cross-system healthcare interoperability and
regulatory-compliant billing workflows for a production clinic management platform.
•Architected backend services for practitioner onboarding — OTP/email verification and multi-facility linking — reducing manual
onboarding steps across the system.
•Validated real-time API integrations using Postman and Swagger, ensuring schema compliance and data integrity across third-party
healthcare systems.
•Designed invoice processing logic aligned with compliance requirements, supporting audit-ready financial records.
Projects
Medosphere — AI-Powered Healthcare PlatformGitHub
React, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis, WebRTC, LangChain, RAG, Pinecone, Neo4j
•Shipped a full-stack healthcare system with OPD booking, digital medical records, and real-time queue management across multiple
departments.
•Developed a GenAI symptom-analysis assistant via RAG with Pinecone vector search, delivering context-aware clinical suggestions at
query time.
•Modeled patient–doctor relationships in Neo4j for efficient multi-hop medical history traversal; deployed WebRTC video consultations
with integrated digital prescriptions.
Nyxel — Competitive Programming & Code Execution PlatformGitHub  —  Live
Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, JUDGE0, Cloudinary
•Launched a competitive programming platform with curated DSA problem sets, submission tracking, and per-user analytics; integrated
JUDGE0 for sandboxed multi-language code execution (C++, Java, Python, JS).
•Optimized PostgreSQL queries via indexing and restructuring, improving retrieval performance for high-concurrency submission
workflows.
CardiaC — Real-Time Communication PlatformGitHub  —  Live
Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Socket.io, LiveKit, Clerk
•Engineered a Discord-inspired platform with server/channel architecture; enabled real-time messaging via Socket.io and voice/video via
LiveKit with sub-second latency.
•Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) using Clerk, enabling fine-grained permission management across server roles and
channel types.
Technical Skills
•Languages:JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, C++, Solidity, Rust
•Frontend:React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
•Backend:Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, JWT, Prisma ORM
•Databases:PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Neo4j
•AI & GenAI:LangChain, RAG, Pinecone Vector DB, Prompt Engineering
•Real-Time & Infra:Socket.io, WebRTC, LiveKit, Kafka, Docker, AWS (EC2, S3), Vercel, Render
Achievements & Activities
•Reliance Foundation Scholar— Nationally selected; recognizes academic merit and leadership among top engineering students
across India.
•Runner-Up, AIHealthTech Hackathon— Delivered a production-grade AI healthcare solution judged on technical depth and
real-world impact.
•Finalist, AMTZ Hackathon (Vizag)— Competed in a 4-day intensive at Andhra Pradesh MedTech Zone, one of Asia’s largest
medical technology clusters.
•Finalist, Startup Pitch (IIM Calcutta & JEA)— Pitched a tech startup to industry investors and academic evaluators at a
national-level event.
•Technical Member, CSE Society, BIT Sindri— Organized coding contests and technical workshops for the department.
